steps.title: Identify the main focus
steps.content: The passage introduces the silversword alliance, describes its wide range of forms, and explains that all members descended from one tarweed ancestor whose descendants adapted to varied Hawaiian habitats.

steps.title: Reject overstatements
steps.content: A wrongly extends the discussion to all plants on the Hawaiian Islands. B focuses on a specific habitat for Dubautia carrii, which the passage does not provide. D claims all Hawaiian plants are in the alliance and mentions multiple ancestors, both unsupported. The answer is C.
